results.title: Do infants with isolated congenital sixth nerve palsy require comprehensive work-up? A retrospective cohort and review of the literature.
results.abstract: The purpose of this study is to describe a case series of infants with isolated congenital sixth nerve palsy (ICSNP) and suggest a management algorithm based on our experience and a review of the literature.
results.journal: Graefe's archive for clinical and experimental ophthalmology = Albrecht von Graefes Archiv fur klinische und experimentelle Ophthalmologie
